case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. SENIOR CARE CONSTRUCTION SPECIALISTS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES (TRANSACTION ID # 100015744) FILED BY DEFENDANT SENIOR CARE CONSTRUCTION SPECIALISTS,  INC. HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
DECLARATION OF JOSHUA THOMPSON ISO SR CARE CONSTRUCTIONS MOTION TO VACATE (TRANSACTION ID # 100015744) FILED BY DEFENDANT SENIOR CARE CONSTRUCTION SPECIALISTS,  INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SENIOR CARE CONSTRUCTION SPECIALISTS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT - MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT TAKEN AGAINST SENIOR CARE ARE VACATED AND SENIOR CARE MUST FILE AN ANSWER NO LATER THAN JUNE 27, 2017. SENIOR CARE HAS SHOWN SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT AND MISTAKE TO WARRANT THE RELIEF IT SEEKS. THAT RELIEF IS SUPPORTED BY CALIFORNIA'S STRONG POLICY OF DECIDING CASES ON THEIR MERITS AND THE ABSENCE OF ANY LEGAL PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SHOULD HAVE STIPULATED TO THE RELIEF SOUGHT BY THIS MOTION GIVEN THAT IT AND ITS ATTORNEY HAD MULTIPLE CONTACTS WITH SENIOR CARE AND ITS NOW COUNSEL SEVERAL TIMES BEFORE ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND SHOULD HAVE KNOWN THAT SENIOR CARE INTENDED TO LITIGATE THIS CASE. THE COURT SIGNS THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-23-17

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Didak, Esq. (818-990-0888) of the Law Offices of Kenneth Freed for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter was discussed. Plaintiff did not give notice to the other side that the tentative ruling was being contested after the tentative ruling came out. The Court orders Plaintiff to contact Counsel for Senior Care Construction for a new hearing date. Counsel to inform the Court through the Contestdeptr@sftc.org email re: new hearing date. At 1:48 P.M. Mr. Didak informs the Court that he is submitting to the tentative ruling of the Court.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SENIOR CARE CONSTRUCTION SPECIALISTS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT - Motion to vacate default and default judgment is GRANTED. The default and default judgment taken against Senior Care are vacated and Senior Care must file an answer no later than June 27, 2017. Senior Care has shown sufficient evidence of excusable neglect and mistake to warrant the relief it seeks. That relief is supported by California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and the absence of any legal prejudice to plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. Plaintiff's request for fees and costs is denied. Plaintiff should have stipulated to the relief sought by this motion given that it and its attorney had multiple contacts with Senior Care and its now counsel several times before entry of default judgment and should have known that Senior Care intended to litigate this case. The Court will sign the proposed order submitted by the Defendant. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (302/hk)
